top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.disp_id
FROM trans t
JOIN disp d ON t.account_id = d.account_id
WHERE t.amount < (
    SELECT AVG(amount)
    FROM trans
    WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '1998'
)
AND strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1998';

SELECT DISTINCT d.client_id
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1998'
  AND t.amount < (
    SELECT AVG(amount)
    FROM trans
    WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '1998'
  )
  AND c.type = 'credit';

SELECT DISTINCT d.disp_id
FROM trans t
JOIN disp d ON t.account_id = d.account_id
WHERE t.amount < (
    SELECT AVG(amount)
    FROM trans
    WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '1998'
)
AND strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1998';

SELECT DISTINCT d.client_id
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1998'
  AND t.amount < (
    SELECT AVG(amount)
    FROM trans
    WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '1998'
      AND account_id IN (
        SELECT account_id
        FROM disp
        JOIN card ON disp.disp_id = card.disp_id
        WHERE card.type = 'credit'
      )
  )
  AND c.type = 'credit';

SELECT DISTINCT d.client_id
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1998'
  AND t.amount < (
    SELECT AVG(amount)
    FROM trans
    WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '1998'
  )
  AND c.type = 'credit';

SELECT DISTINCT d.disp_id
FROM trans t
JOIN disp d ON t.account_id = d.account_id
WHERE t.amount < (
    SELECT AVG(amount)
    FROM trans
    WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '1998'
)
AND strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1998';

SELECT DISTINCT d.disp_id
FROM disp d
JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
JOIN trans t ON d.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE c.type = 'credit'
  AND strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1998'
  AND t.amount < (
    SELECT AVG(amount)
    FROM trans t2
    JOIN card c2 ON t2.account_id = (
      SELECT account_id FROM disp WHERE disp_id = c2.disp_id
    )
    WHERE c2.type = 'credit'
      AND strftime('%Y', t2.date) = '1998'
  );

SELECT DISTINCT d.client_id
FROM disp d
JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
JOIN trans t ON d.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1998'
  AND t.amount < (
    SELECT AVG(amount)
    FROM trans
    WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '1998'
  );

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.disp_id
FROM trans t
JOIN disp d ON t.account_id = d.account_id
WHERE t.amount < (
    SELECT AVG(amount)
    FROM trans
    WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '1998'
)
AND strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1998';
